posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2
posting.locationSummary: Capital District, Mohawk Valley, and North Country regions
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at the Albany JATC or Eastern Contractors Association, or complete the application online and mail it to the JATC. Applications must be received by April 30, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2, 302 Centre Drive, Albany, NY 12203; or Eastern Contractors Association, 6 Airline Drive, Albany, NY 12205
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers JATC #2, 302 Centre Drive, Albany, NY 12203
posting.applicationHours: 8:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within Local Union #2's geographic jurisdiction for at least six months before applying, including Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, Washington, Greene, Rensselaer, Fulton, Hamilton, Montgomery, Saratoga, Essex, Franklin, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, and St. Lawrence counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes, and a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.
Must be physically able to lift 50-100 pounds.
Must have a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles.

Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least six months prior to application, including Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, Washington, Greene, Rensselaer, Fulton, Hamilton, Montgomery, Saratoga, Essex, Franklin, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, and St. Lawrence counties.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 17 or older, able to lift 50-100 pounds, have a valid driver's license and reliable transportation, and live in the union's jurisdiction for at least six months before applying.
posting.contactName: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2
posting.contactSummary: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2, at (518) 456-5477.
